name: Supreme King Z-ARC - Synchro Universe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>覇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ズァーク－シンクロ・ユニバース
name_jp_tl: Supreme King Dragon Zarc - Synchro Universe
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You can Tribute 1 "Supreme King Dragon" or "Supreme King Gate" Pendulum Monster; Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Supreme King Z-ARC - Synchro Universe" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner DARK Pendulum Monsters
This card's name becomes "Supreme King Z-ARC" while on the field. After damage calculation, if this card destroyed an opponent's monster by battle, OR when this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can Special Summon up to 2 "Supreme King Dragon" monsters from your Deck, Extra Deck, and/or GY in Defense Position. If this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.
pend_eff: You can Tribute 1 "Supreme King Dragon" or "Supreme King Gate" Pendulum Monster; Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Supreme King Z-ARC - Synchro Universe" once per turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Activates if battle damage is inflicted
Activates if destroyed by card effect
stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
summoning: Does not require specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Attribute specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Pendulum Monsters as non-Tuner Synchro Materials

Special Summons from your Extra Deck
